title: eupatorium rotundifolium var. saundersii
intro: Eupatorium rotundifolium var. saundersii, also known as roundleaf thoroughwort, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of roundleaf thoroughwort include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Roundleaf thoroughwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, for its medicinal and health benefits.
